---
title: "About"
---

[Magnus Johansson](https://ki.se/en/people/magnus-johansson-3) is a licensed psychologist with a PhD in behavior analysis. I work as a research specialist in psychometrics and statistics at Karolinska Institutet, Centre for Psychiatry Research, Department of Clinical Neuroscience.

You can also find me on:

- Bluesky: [@pgmj.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/pgmj.bsky.social) 
- ORCID: [0000-0003-1669-592X](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1669-592X)
- Mastodon: [@pgmj](https://scicomm.xyz/@pgmj)
- OSF: [Open Science Framework](https://osf.io/8u2x3/)

and of course on [GitHub](https://github.com/pgmj)
